title: crucianella gilanica subsp. demavendensis
intro: Crucianella gilanica subsp. demavendensis, also known as a species of the genus Crucianella, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Crucianella gilanica subsp. demavendensis include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and maximize its health benefits.
